channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Boston shuts out Utah Hockey Club, 1-0
item.description: BOSTON (ABC4 Sports) - For the fifth time this season, the Utah Hockey Club failed to score a single goal. Joonas Korpisalo made 21 saves for the Boston Bruins in a 1-0 win against the Utah Hockey Club at TD Garden on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Athletes see climate change as threatening their sports and their health. Some are speaking up
item.description: Pragnya Mohan has been a professional triathlete for nearly a decade, but summers in her native India are now so hot that she can’t train there anymore.
item.dc:creator: Dorany Pineda And Michael Phillis, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: President Biden welcomes 2024 NBA champion Boston Celtics to White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House was tinted green on Thursday, when President Joe Biden — Secret Service code name: Celtic — welcomed “Coach Joe” Mazzulla and the Boston Celtics to the South Lawn to celebrate the franchise’s unprecedented 18th NBA championship.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani in early stages of rehab from shoulder surgery and hopes to be ready for opening day
item.description: Shohei Ohtani is in the early stages of rehabilitation from left shoulder surgery after the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penn State wins trademark case over retailer's use of vintage logos, images
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Penn State has won a closely watched trademark fight over an online retailer's use of its vintage sports logos and images. A Pennsylvania jury awarded Penn State $28,000 in damages on Wednesday over products made and sold by Vintage Brand and Sportswear Inc.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ja Morant's teammate appears to shoot imaginary gun as three-point celebration; social media reacts
item.description: Ja Morant's teammate, Desmond Bane, celebrated a three-pointer by appearing to pretend to shoot a gun, which prompted some jokes on social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Clips of Linda McMahon taking violent wrestling slams from massive WWE giants spread amid Trump cabinet pick
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's new secretary of Education, Linda McMahon, was once the subject of violent WWE action, and some of it involved her children.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Jump around: Cavaliers improve to 14-0, celebrate by dancing with frog mascot
item.description: They continued their perfect start, improving to 14-0 on Friday night with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls in an NBA Cup opener that served as another showcase for a Cavs team clicking like never before.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: The world's tallest teenager, 7-foot-9 Olivier Rioux, plans to redshirt at Florida this season
item.description: GAINESVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The world’s tallest teenager might have to wait a year to become the world’s tallest college basketball player. Florida coach Todd Golden says Olivier Rioux, a 7-foot-9 freshman who owns a spot in the Guinness record book, is planning to redshirt.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mike Tyson concedes the role of villain to young foe in 58-year-old's fight with Jake Paul
item.description: Friendship is at the heart of how a fight came together between 58-year-old former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and much younger YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC
